environment_type: Primary Setting / Massive Martian Industrial Complex
visual_summary: A colossal, monolithic industrial complex characterized by brutalist architecture and massive concrete structures. The interior consists of vast industrial halls dominated by enormous radium pump machinery and high-tech atmosphere plant components.
layout_notes: Colossal scale featuring vast interior halls and massive radium pumps.
lighting: Industrial, sterile, and highly controlled; utilizes specialized lighting related to "the ninth ray" and radium-based energy sources.
constraints: Advanced technological locks require specific thought-wave frequencies for access.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific spatial configuration of the vast interior halls is not detailed.
